nasb.text: As they were striking the people and I alone was left, I fell on my face and cried out saying, “Alas, Lord God! Are You destroying the whole remnant of Israel by pouring out Your wrath on Jerusalem?”

esv.text: And while they were striking, and I was left alone, I fell upon my face, and cried, “Ah, Lord God! Will you destroy all the remnant of Israel in the outpouring of your wrath on Jerusalem?”

cnv.text: 他們殺戮的時候，只留下我一個人，我就臉伏在地，呼叫說：“哎，主耶和華啊！難道你要向耶路撒冷傾倒你的烈怒，使所有以色列餘剩的人都滅絕麼？”

ccb.text: 那时，只留下我一个人，我便俯伏在地上呼求：“唉，主耶和华啊！你向耶路撒冷倾倒你的烈怒，要灭绝以色列所有的余民吗？”
